fields.summary: Gets or sets the component swizzle mapping for the YCbCr sampler conversion.
fields.value: A <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrComponents" /> describing how color components are remapped during conversion.

fields.summary: Indicates whether this instance is equal to the specified <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrConversionInfo" />.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if all fields are equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.obj: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrConversionInfo" /> to compare with this instance.

fields.summary: Determines whether two <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrConversionInfo" /> values are equal.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if <paramref name="left" /> and <paramref name="right" /> are equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

entries.signature: public static bool operator == (SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrConversionInfo left, SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrConversionInfo right);

fields.summary: Determines whether two <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrConversionInfo" /> values are not equal.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if <paramref name="left" /> and <paramref name="right" /> differ; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

entries.signature: public static bool operator != (SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrConversionInfo left, SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrConversionInfo right);

fields.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the sampler filter must match the chroma filter.
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the Vulkan sampler's min/mag filter must equal the chroma filter; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether linear filtering is supported for this YCbCr conversion.
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the conversion supports linear filtering; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
